close_reason: Deleted VacancyCreationPhase, StorageRecruitmentPhase, and VersionDeterminationPhase. Updated LogRecruitmentPhase to transition to LogReplayPhase.
description:
Delete phases that are no longer needed with materializer-based recovery:

DELETE:
- lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/vacancy_creation_phase.ex
- lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/storage_recruitment_phase.ex  
- lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/version_determination_phase.ex

DELETE TESTS:
- test/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/vacancy_creation_phase_test.exs
- test/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/storage_recruitment_phase_test.exs
- test/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/version_determination_phase_test.exs

Rationale:
- VacancyCreation: No longer creating storage team vacancies
- StorageRecruitment: Materializers self-organize from logs, not recruited by recovery
- VersionDetermination: Moved to LogRecoveryPlanningPhase (queries logs, not storage_teams)
title: Remove obsolete recovery phases
